title: gonolobus scaber
intro: Gonolobus scaber, also known as the rough gongronema, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Gonolobus scaber can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
